focus.appsSubtitle: Select the apps that distract you the most.
focus.freeLimitBody: On the free plan you can monitor 1 app only (TikTok is Premium).
focus.notInstalledBody: {{name}} does not appear to be installed on this device (scheme: {{scheme}}).
focus.customHint: A URL scheme (e.g. tg://) is required so we can verify the app is installed.
focus.schemeRequiredBody: Enter a URL scheme so we can verify installation before adding the app.
focus.customInvalidScheme: This scheme does not resolve — the app is probably not installed.
focus.duplicateBody: You already have an app named “{{name}}”. Pick a different name to avoid duplicates.
focus.accessibilityBody: To enable the shield on Android, open Accessibility and turn Scrolfy ON. This is a one-time setup.
focus.shieldBody: Real app blocking needs Screen Time (iOS) or Accessibility / parental controls (Android). Open system settings to enable the right permissions for your device.

mastery.title: Your progress.
mastery.subtitle: Every win counts. You are on the right track.
mastery.saved: {{minutes}} min of scrolling turned into study time.
mastery.streakHint: Keep it up to unlock the “Focus Master” badge.
mastery.analysisBody: {{answered}} quizzes · {{pct}}% success · your learning cycles are improving.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile data, language, theme, and shield.
settings.permissionsHint: Screen Time / Accessibility — required for real blocking on device.

slide1.title: Scroll smarter.
slide1.description: Every minute spent scrolling is a lost opportunity to grow. Take back control of your time.

slide2.title: The intelligent shield
slide2.description: Scrolfy intercepts your impulses and turns them into learning moments.

slide3.title: Learn to unlock
slide3.description: One challenge a day to sharpen your mind and earn your social media time.
